title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Rebecca, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as law faces Doflamingo and Fujitora as the Caesar exchange collapses, while Luffy’s group remains tied up in the Colosseum and Dressrosa’s secrets.

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: If you're gonna do it, do it now, Rebecca!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's why you brought him here, yeah?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oi I'm gonna spill my food!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How could he be faster than her!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...!! do as you must with me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Because I tried to kill you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's fine. I'm not dead. And besides, you weren't really trying to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: YOWCH... HAA... to be forgiven that easily...

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: But all we've seen here is the true gap between your strengths... Rebecca.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: If only she could have taken out one top contender in advance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Her odds would be that much better.

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
